notes: Expanded diagnostic log to capture (a) play() promise outcomes — audio.play() is wrapped to log play():call / play():resolved / play():reject(reason) so we can see if the audio element is even attempting playback; (b) loadTrack entries logging the track kind (audio vs text), so the log clearly distinguishes audio-file tracks from TTS-driven text-only tracks; (c) TTS lifecycle — tts:start, tts:pause, tts:resume, tts:stop — so we can tell whether what's pausing on background is the audio element or the speech engine. The previous log was silent for users on text-only tracks because TTS doesn't go through the audio element.
